name: /plugin-update rejects the update when the plugin tests fail after the upstream code change
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example && printf 'name: example
rules: [{id: foo, detector: x}]
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && printf 'plugin_id: example
source_repo: acme/example
' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-update.sh" example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub fail 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'rule_tester_failed' err.txt && grep -q 'update_blocked' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
